title: Kyiv: 200 drones launched
description: Breaking: Russia launches daytime mass attack with over 200 drones on Ukraine. Air raid alerts rang out across Ukraine as a massive swarm of attack drones crossed the Russian border shortly after 11:00 a.m. local time.
description_en: Breaking: Russia launches daytime mass attack with over 200 drones on Ukraine. Air raid alerts rang out across Ukraine as a massive swarm of attack drones crossed the Russian border shortly after 11:00 a.m. local time.

title: 5️⃣6️⃣Russia has changed the tactics of using "Shakhedov", - Flash...
title_en: 5️⃣6️⃣Russia has changed the tactics of using "Shakhedov", - Flash...
description: 5️⃣6️⃣Russia has changed the tactics of using "Shakhedov", - Flash According to the adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergei Beskrestny, this time the drones are moving along the border with Belarus at a distance of 5-10 km, literally one by one and in large groups. In this way, Russia is trying to overload the air defense system so that as many drones as possible can break into the depths of the country.
description_en: 5️⃣6️⃣Russia has changed the tactics of using "Shakhedov", - Flash According to the adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergei Beskrestny, this time the drones are moving along the border with Belarus at a distance of 5-10 km, literally one by one and in large groups. In this way, Russia is trying to overload the air defense system so that as many drones as possible can break into the depths of the country.
description_uk: 5️⃣6️⃣русня изменила тактику применения «Шахедов», — Флэш По словам советника министра обороны Сергея Бескрестного, на этот раз дроны движутся вдоль границы с Беларусью на расстоянии 5-10 км, буквально один за другим и сразу большими группами. Таким образом русня пытается перегрузить систему ПВО, чтобы как можно больше беспилотников смогли прорваться вглубь страны.

title: Casualties reported
description: Tactical medicine is knowledge that saves lives in war. Scouts of the 92nd OShBr named after of the basket chieftain Ivan Sirk, are constantly improving their skills in providing aid to themselves and their wounded comrades in combat conditions. During the training, fighters practice applying tourniquets, evacuating the wounded, stopping critical bleeding, working under stress and under enemy fire. In modern warfare, everyone...
description_en: Tactical medicine is knowledge that saves lives in war. Scouts of the 92nd OShBr named after of the basket chieftain Ivan Sirk, are constantly improving their skills in providing aid to themselves and their wounded comrades in combat conditions. During the training, fighters practice applying tourniquets, evacuating the wounded, stopping critical bleeding, working under stress and under enemy fire. In modern warfare, everyone...
description_uk: Тактична медицина — це знання, які на війні рятують життя. Розвідники 92 ОШБр ім. кошового отамана Івана Сірка, постійно вдосконалюють навички надання допомоги собі і пораненим побратимам у бойових умовах. Під час занять бійці відпрацьовують накладання турнікетів, евакуацію поранених, зупинку критичних кровотеч, роботу в умовах стресу та під вогневим впливом противника. У сучасній війні кожен...

title: Drone incoming
description: Not the most pleasant news this morning: monitoring channels report several waves of Shahedov launches. According to their data, there are already about 60 Russian drones in the airspace of Ukraine. Most of which move in the direction of western regions of Ukraine.
description_en: Not the most pleasant news this morning: monitoring channels report several waves of Shahedov launches. According to their data, there are already about 60 Russian drones in the airspace of Ukraine. Most of which move in the direction of western regions of Ukraine.
description_uk: Не самые приятные новости с утра: мониторинговые каналы сообщают о нескольких волнах запусков «Шахедов» По их данным, уже сейчас в воздушном пространстве Украины около 60 российских дронов. Большинство из которых движутся в направлении западных областей Украины.

title: Kursk: Drone incoming
description: 111 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of May 13 (from 18:00 on May 12), the enemy attacked 139 attack UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and imitation drones of the "Parody" type from the directions: Kursk, Bryansk, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Chauda - TOT Autonomous Republic of Crimea. The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW and unmanned systems units, mobile fire...

description: New Russia sanctions feature individuals exposed in Kyiv Independent documentary. The EU, Canada, and the U.K. unveiled new sanctions listings on May 12 against individuals and entities involved in Russia's illegal abduction and indoctrination of Ukrainian children, some of whom were identified in the Kyiv Independent documentary, The War They Play.

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Had a meeting with the head of the Spanish Congress of Deputies, Francina Armengol. First of all, they discussed defense cooperation: air defense, development of the PURL and SAFE programs. We equally understand that Europe must be self-sufficient in protecting the sky from ballistics, drones and other threats. The Special Tribunal for the crime of aggression against Ukraine and efforts to return children abducted by Russia were also discussed in detail. Grateful...
description_en: Had a meeting with the head of the Spanish Congress of Deputies, Francina Armengol. First of all, they discussed defense cooperation: air defense, development of the PURL and SAFE programs. We equally understand that Europe must be self-sufficient in protecting the sky from ballistics, drones and other threats. The Special Tribunal for the crime of aggression against Ukraine and efforts to return children abducted by Russia were also discussed in detail. Grateful...
description_uk: Провів зустріч із головою Конгресу депутатів Іспанії Франсіною Арменголь. Передусім обговорили оборонну співпрацю: ППО, розвиток програм PURL і SAFE. Однаково розуміємо, що Європа має бути самодостатньою в захисті неба від балістики, дронів та інших загроз. Детально обговорили також Спецтрибунал щодо злочину агресії проти України та зусилля для повернення викрадених Росією дітей. Вдячний...
